name: The Classic
imageAlt: Overhead view of a person working at a pottery wheel with brown clay
shortDescription: A focused 2-hour solo session to learn the basics of the wheel. Perfect for complete beginners.

name: Group Session
imageAlt: Group of friends laughing and making pottery together at a large workbench
shortDescription: Bring your friends. We provide the wine, the clay, and the music. Ideal for birthdays and hen parties.

name: Date Night
imageAlt: Two sets of hands working on the same piece of clay on a wheel in warm lighting
shortDescription: Shared wheel time for two. A quiet evening of co-creation in the studio. Wine included.

name: Corporate Workshop
imageAlt: Colleagues collaborating on clay pieces in a bright studio setting
shortDescription: Team-building with a difference. Full studio hire for up to 20 people, materials and instructor included.
